paragraph: South Hackensack has almost no transaction volume to speak of over the last six months. One single-family sale closed at $750,000 after nine days on market, and one multi-family property also sold. With such sparse activity, trying to read market temperature from these numbers would be misleading. What you're really seeing is that South Hackensack isn't a high-velocity market. If you're serious about buying or selling here, you'll want to work with an agent who knows the local landscape and has access to comparable sales data from the broader region, because the town's own recent transaction history simply can't tell you what your property is worth or how fast it might move.
